title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following approaches to international development and reducing global inequality, then decide which two are most effective.
options: Providing emergency humanitarian aid during crises
Building long-term infrastructure such as schools, roads and hospitals
Supporting local entrepreneurship and microfinance initiatives
Cancelling the debt of the poorest nations
Training and employing local people rather than relying on foreign workers

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to international development and aid. Discuss the following approaches to international development and reducing global inequality, then decide which two are most effective. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most effective..
